'''chakaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hickster|hickster]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hickster|hickster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chakaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækæhæth|chækæhæth]] || [[word:chækæhæj|chækæhæj]] || [[word:chækæhæsh|chækæhæsh]] || [[word:chækæhæ|chækæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakakahath|chakakahath]] || [[word:chakakahaj|chakakahaj]] || [[word:chakakahash|chakakahash]] || [[word:chakakaha|chakakaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakahath|chakahath]] || [[word:chakahaj|chakahaj]] || [[word:chakahash|chakahash]] || [[word:chakaha|chakaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakafhath|chakafhath]] || [[word:chakafhaj|chakafhaj]] || [[word:chakafhash|chakafhash]] || [[word:chakafhaf|chakafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakahatha|chakahatha]] || [[word:chakahaja|chakahaja]] || [[word:chakahasha|chakahasha]] || [[word:chakahaka|chakahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakahath|chakahath]] || [[word:chakahaj|chakahaj]] || [[word:chakahash|chakahash]] || [[word:chakaha|chakaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakahathal|chakahathal]] || [[word:chakahajal|chakahajal]] || [[word:chakahashal|chakahashal]] || [[word:chakahakal|chakahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakahathatha|chakahathatha]] || [[word:chakahajaja|chakahajaja]] || [[word:chakahashasha|chakahashasha]] || [[word:chakahaka|chakahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakahathan|chakahathan]] || [[word:chakahajan|chakahajan]] || [[word:chakahashan|chakahashan]] || [[word:chakahakan|chakahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakahathaoro|chakahathaoro]] || [[word:chakahajaoro|chakahajaoro]] || [[word:chakahashaoro|chakahashaoro]] || [[word:chakahakaoro|chakahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
